original_prompt: when booking a appointment, the user must select the location and then there is a calculation that happens based on the appointment location and time. based on the time of the appointment it would look at the most recent appointment for each van closest to this appointment, and assume that the van would be in that location. based on that it would add the transport duration from point a to point b to that location automatically based on the calculation of the distance and the travel duration. this should be done automatically while i am booking with visual hints appearing in the booking modal
rephrased_goal: Implement automatic travel duration calculation for vans during appointment booking, showing visual hints in the modal based on previous appointment location or van default location.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Create travel logic helper in src/lib/travel-logic.js
subtasks_required: Implement logic to find 'origin' location for a van at a specific date/time
tasks.testing_criteria: Exported functions work with test coords.

subtasks_required: Check math results for known distances
